warehouseQuery.query:
Select distinct study_id, study_alias
from gpdip_cdm.study_alias_v

select * 
from gpdip_cdm.subject_v WHERE (SUBJ_STATUS NOT IN ('DELETED')
OR SUBJ_STATUS IS NULL)
AND DELETE_FLAG = 'N'

select distinct study_id,cohort_name,cohort_id,subj_strata_num,subj_cohort_num,label_type
from gpdip_uddl_dna.enrollment_planning_curves_thaded
where cohort_name != 'All Participants'

select distinct study_id, study_site_number
from gpdip_prd.gpdip_cdm.study_site
